long_desc: Werith tends bar here, listening but not talking very much.
detailed_desc:
From the size of those arms, this man must've once been a blacksmith.  You bet
he can more than take on anyone who wants to knock over his wayhouse for a
little cash...  This man is truly immense.  His movements sure, his eyes
keen...  You don't think messing with him would be a good idea.
